options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -cover_fixed_macros
options.description: force flexModel cover fixed macros belong to it when using new planDesign algorithm

options.name: -flexmodel_constraint_type
options.description: {guide|region|fence} Convert flexModel to the specified constraint type in proto_design.

options.name: -place_macro
options.description: control if do macro placement in planDesign

options.name: -remove_overlap
options.description: control if do remove overlap in planDesign
